summary: Test suite covers core license-checking logic well but critically fails major task requirements: (1) NO act integration tests—task requires 'ALL TESTS MUST RUN THROUGH ACT' with per-test-case act push execution and act-result.txt artifact, completely missing; (2) NO CLI end-to-end tests of src/index.ts; (3) NO error-handling tests beyond one JSON parse case (missing file I/O, missing args, malformed config); (4) NO requirements.txt or manifest-format variants; (5) workflow.test.ts only string-matches YAML content, never validates workflow executes or produces correct output. licenseChecker.test.ts itself is well-structured (good describe blocks, clear mocks, happy path + a few edge cases), but rigor is shallow—only tests case-insensitivity and deny precedence, no boundary conditions (empty deps, large lists, special chars, concurrent lookups). Tests would NOT catch regressions in the CLI, arg parsing, or real workflow execution. The act-result.txt file requirement is unmet, making this an artifact-incomplete test suite.
